prompt: a website new trading firm named 'stable alpha' designed in the style of berkshire hathaway website : looks simple and text only
prompt_refined: Design a website homepage for 'Stable Alpha', a new financial trading firm. The aesthetic should precisely mimic the Berkshire Hathaway corporate website: extremely simple, text-only, using default browser fonts, blue hyperlinked text, and a stark, unstyled HTML appearance with no images or modern design elements.
objects: Modern UI elements (e.g., complex buttons, gradients, shadows) (should not be present)
